name: codex-voice
description: Native /voice side-channel for Codex threads; pairs well with OpenScreech STT and Supertonic local TTS.

interface.longDescription: Codex Voice adds a per-thread local voice command pipeline. Pair it with OpenScreech for versatile, customizable STT and Supertonic for local TTS, or use ElevenLabs as a hosted TTS alternative. External STT clients post to the displayed listener endpoint while technical work stays in the thread.
defaultPrompt: Run /voice on to start a voice side-channel.
Run /voice status to inspect the listener.
